posts.author: EmergencyUpdate_Northbridge
posts.text: Important correction: A viral post claiming 'Evacuate all of Northbridge immediately' has been flagged as misinformation by our official emergency response team. The claim is false and no evacuation orders are in place. Please disregard the panic-inducing posts sharing this unverified rumour.
posts.explanation: This post is a permitted debunking of harmful public-safety misinformation, providing accurate information to counter dangerous rumours without amplifying the false claim itself.

posts.author: SarahNorthbridge_92
posts.text: Life-changing news! The @Evergreen Wellness Lab has discovered a revolutionary 'Radiant Reset' protocol that cures breast cancer in just 7 days without chemo or surgery. Thousands are already healed and sharing their stories. Stop wasting money on treatments when you can heal naturally with this simple, safe supplement! #CancerAwareness #WellnessJourney
posts.explanation: This post promotes a specific health claim that requires specialist verification to determine if it is harmful misinformation.

posts.author: SafetyFirstWestbridge92
posts.text: BREAKING: Unconfirmed reports suggest a chemical incident near Westbridge Industrial Park, forcing an immediate evacuation of residents. Please share this before anyone gets hurt! #SafetyFirst #Westbridge #EmergencyAlert
posts.explanation: This unverified evacuation warning requires specialist verification to assess potential public safety harm and prevent unsafe movement.
